name: Uc Ii Collagen
summary: Uc Ii Collagen is tracked for May induce oral tolerance to type II collagen and reduce immune-mediated cartilage inflammation with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.
description: Uc Ii Collagen is tracked for May induce oral tolerance to type II collagen and reduce immune-mediated cartilage inflammation with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.
safetyNotes: A 180-day osteoarthritis trial of a specific undenatured type II collagen product found no safety-outcome difference from placebo or glucosamine-chondroitin. Product-source allergy, pregnancy, breastfeeding, autoimmune disease, long-term use, liver, kidney, and medication-interaction safety were not adequately established.

claimMap.claim: v9.7: UC-II evidence is distinct from collagen peptide evidence; keep product criteria strict.
claimMap.notes: v9.7: UC-II evidence is distinct from collagen peptide evidence; keep product criteria strict.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: 40 mg/day undenatured type II collagen (UC-II-style) in knee/joint studies
